REMARK: NO HEARING HELD FOR 01/27/2026 - EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR LEAVE TO CONDUCT DEPOSITION AFTER DISCOVERY CUT OFF AND FOR COST-SHIFTING OF COURT REPORTER FEES. FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS: 1. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY FROM THE MOVING PARTY(PER SF LR 2.7(B)). 2. NO APPEARANCES WERE MADE; DEFENSE COUNSEL WHO SIGNED UP FOR COURT DID NOT APPEAR.

REMARK: HEARING HELD EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR LEAVE TO CONDUCT DEPOSITION AFTER DISCOVERY CUTOFF AND FOR COST-SHIFTING OF COURT REPORTER FEES. THE APPLICATION IS DENIED, THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF THE DEPOSITION OR FILED A MOTION FOR DEPOSITON PRIOR TO TODAY'S EX PARTE HEARING. PLAINTIFF ALSO REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL; THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ADVISED PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH THE APPLICABLE COURT RULES AND STATUTORY REQUIREMENTS. TRIAL REMAINS SCHEDULED FOR FEBRUARY 9, 2026.
